query: Bump pypdf to the latest version in our repo. We pin it in both pyproject.toml and requirements-server.txt.
expected_behavior: Updates the pin in BOTH pyproject.toml and requirements-server.txt in the same change (keep parallel manifests in lockstep)
Notes that drift between manifests is how a vulnerable pin hides from a scanner that reads only one
Runs / prescribes the manifest-level audit (pip-audit over every requirements*.txt + pyproject.toml; scripts/audit.sh) as a merge-blocking gate
Notes that an image scan alone would miss this (blind spots: MEDIUM advisories, manifest-not-in-image, drift)
anti_behavior: Treats a green image (Trivy) scan as proof of no known vulnerabilities
